chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حُبِّ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْحِرْصِ عَلَيْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – Love of the world and the greed upon it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/241)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/241)
text: مَا فَتَحَ اللَّهُ عَلَى عَبْدٍ بَاباً مِنْ أَمْرِ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا فَتَحَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْحِرْصِ مِثْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> does not Open upon a servant, a door from the matters of the world except Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Opens upon him, from the greed, the like of it’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “With every door to the worldly affairs that Allah opens to a servant. He also opens a door of greed to him.”
